ActionPlanTemplate.description: Standard milestone tasks for an EA-class NEPA review. Task due dates are relative to action plan creation. Assign to IndividualApplication with Review Type = EA. If significant impacts are found, escalate to EIS template.
ActionPlanTemplate.name: NEPA EA Process Milestones

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate EA: Scope Issues and Notify Agencies

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Initiate EA process. Identify scope of issues and range of alternatives. Notify cooperating agencies and interested parties. Confirm no categorical exclusion applies. Due ~14 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Complete required adjacent statute consultations (ESA, CWA, NHPA) identified during scoping. Upload consultation documents to NEPA record. Due ~90 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Publish Draft EA for Public Comment

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Draft EA for Public Comment (30 Days)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Publish Draft EA for public comment (minimum 30 days). Upload to NEPA document record. Set comment period start and end dates on the process record. Due ~180 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Close Comment Period and Log Comments

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Close EA Comment Period and Log Comments

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Close EA comment period. Log all substantive comments as PublicComplaint records linked to the process. Begin review to determine if significant impacts are identified. Due ~215 days after process start.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Issue FONSI or Escalate to EIS

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Issue Finding of No Significant Impact (FONSI) or Escalate to EIS

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Issue FONSI if no significant impacts found. Upload FONSI to NEPA document record and update process status to Completed. If significant impacts found, initiate EIS process and assign NEPA EIS Process Milestones template. Due ~300 days after process start.
